subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter was received and its contents became known. Due to the multitude of occupations and difficulties, time is [3.5s]... ...If a man were to perform every good work, yet fail in the least scruple to be entirely trustworthy and honest, his good works would become as dry tinder
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید مضمون معلوم گردید از کثرت مشاغل و غوائل فرصت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @acting according to the exigencies of the day; pragmatism, @wisdom [hikmat], @Imam Husayn, @praise and encouragement
